name: IMMUNOTHERAPY
what_it_solves: CandidateAxis enum member — evaluated per-patient by the SL engine.
how_it_solves: Fed through modality_fuser + tier_assign; if is_rs_sensitive=True and RS score ≥ 0.40, apply_rs_promotion() may lift MECHANISTIC→STRONG when independent evidence exists.
why_it_exists: IO axis included for tier-fusion completeness; not RS-sensitive.
